variants.name: primary
variants.when: the single main action in a region

variants.name: danger
variants.when: irreversible/destructive actions, always with a confirm step

usage.when: Commit an action on the current view (submit, confirm, save).
usage.whenNot: Navigation between pages — use Link. Destructive actions without confirmation — pair with ConfirmDialog.

alternatives.when: navigating rather than committing an action

dont: Two primary buttons competing in one region
usage.a11y: Minimum 44px touch target; never indicate state with color alone.

usage.when: Navigate to another page or view.
usage.whenNot: Committing an action on the current view — use Button.

alternatives.when: the click performs an action rather than navigation

usage.when: Show a brief, non-blocking confirmation or status message.
usage.whenNot: Anything that needs a decision or blocks the user — use ConfirmDialog.

alternatives.when: the user must make a blocking choice

dont: Put a required action only inside a toast

usage.when: Block the user to confirm a destructive or irreversible action.
do: Name the consequence in the confirm button ("Delete 3 files")
dont: Generic "Are you sure?" without naming the consequence

patterns.name: Destructive confirmation
patterns.problem: A user triggers an irreversible action (delete, remove, reset).
patterns.solution: A danger-variant Button that opens a ConfirmDialog naming the exact consequence.
patterns.rationale: Irreversible actions must be blocking and must state the consequence, not just "Are you sure?".

guidelines.name: One primary action per region
guidelines.rule: Each view region has at most one primary Button; everything else is secondary or tertiary.

guidelines.name: Non-blocking messages use Toast
guidelines.rule: Status and success feedback that needs no decision uses Toast, never a Modal or ConfirmDialog.

screens.name: Settings
screens.purpose: Account settings; entry point for destructive account actions.

screens.name: Delete account dialog
screens.purpose: Block the user to confirm permanent account deletion.
